values.title: Values
items: Artistic Excellence: Fostering creativity and innovation.
Luxury Leadership: Delivering bespoke, premium talent services.

Cultural Innovation: Bridging heritage with modernity for authentic narratives.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Your trust is our priority.
privacy.intro: At Donatella, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information.
privacy.intro2: This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, share, and safeguard your information when you use our platform. By accessing or using our services, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

sections.head: 1. Information We collect
sections.des: We collect the following types of information to provide and improve our services:
points: Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number, and physical address. Payment and billing information (e.g., bank details or credit card information).
Profile Information: Photos, portfolio details, skillsets, and experience you choose to share on your profile. Preferences related to talent services or projects.
Usage Data: Log data such as IP address, browser type, operating system, and access times. Actions taken on the platform, like searches, messages, and project interactions.
Communications: Messages, inquiries, and support requests sent through the platform.

sections.head: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.des: We use the information we collect for the following purposes:
points: To Provide Services: Match talents with clients and facilitate project collaboration.
To Enhance User Experience: Improve the functionality and usability of our platform.
To Communicate with You: Send updates, respond to inquiries, and share promotional materials.
To Ensure Security: Detect and prevent fraudulent or unauthorized activities.
To Comply with Legal Obligations: Meet legal and regulatory requirements.

sections.head: 3. Sharing Your Information
sections.des: We share your information only when necessary and as described below:
points: With Clients or Talents: To facilitate projects, profiles may be visible to clients or talents depending on platform settings.
Service Providers: With trusted third-party providers who help us operate our platform (e.g., payment processors, hosting services).
Legal Requirements: When required to comply with laws, regulations, or legal processes.
Business Transfers: In the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of company assets.

sections.head: 4.Your Choices and Rights
sections.des: You have the following rights regarding your personal information:
points: Access and Update: Review and update your profile information through your account.
Delete Your Account: Request account deletion by contacting us at [Insert Contact Email].
Opt-Out: Unsubscribe from promotional communications at any time.
Restrict Data Use: Limit how we process your information under certain circumstances.

sections.head: 5. Data Security
points: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data. However, no system is completely secure. Please notify us immediately if you suspect unauthorized access to your account.

sections.head: 6. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
points: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze platform performance, and deliver tailored content.
You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings.

sections.head: 7. Third-Party Links
points: Our platform may contain links to third-party websites.
We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of these external sites.

sections.head: 8. Children's Privacy
points: Our platform is not intended for individuals under the age of 18.
We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors.

sections.head: 9. Changes to This Privacy Policy
points: We may update this policy from time to time.
Significant changes will be communicated via email or a notice on our platform.

termsAndConditions.title: TERMS & CONDITIONS

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: These Terms & Conditions govern your use of DonatellaKSA ("we", "us", "our"). By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

eligibility.title: 2. Eligibility
points: Users must be 18 years or older.
Users must provide accurate, complete, and up-to-date information.
Use of the services must comply with applicable laws.

internationalUse.title: 3. International Use
internationalUse.content: Our services may be accessed by users located inside or outside the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Users accessing the services from outside Saudi Arabia are responsible for ensuring that their use complies with applicable local laws in their country of residence. These Terms shall remain governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia regardless of the user's location.

accounts.title: 4. Accounts
points: Users are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their account credentials.
You are responsible for all activities that occur under your account.
We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.

services.title: 5. Services
points: We facilitate connections between clients and talent.
Any agreement, booking, or engagement is entered into directly between the involved parties.
We are not responsible for the conduct, performance, or outcome of any engagement.

payments.title: 6. Payments
points: Payments are processed through third-party payment service providers.
Any applicable fees will be displayed before confirmation.
We are not responsible for delays, errors, or failures caused by payment providers.

cancellationsRefunds.title: 7. Cancellations & Refunds
points: Cancellation and refund terms depend on the specific agreement between the parties.
Any disputes must be reported within 7 days of completion of the engagement.

communications.title: 8. Communications
points: Users agree to communicate respectfully and in good faith.
Any misuse of the services may result in account suspension or termination.

intellectualProperty.title: 9. Intellectual Property
points: All content, branding, and materials provided by DonatellaKSA remain our property.
Users may not copy, distribute, or use content without prior permission.
Talent retains rights to their name and image unless otherwise agreed in writing.

dataPrivacy.title: 10. Data & Privacy
points: Personal data is handled in accordance with applicable Saudi data protection laws.
By using the services, you consent to the processing of your data as necessary to operate the services.

limitationOfLiability.title: 11. Limitation of Liability
points: We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.
Our total liability, if any, is limited to the amount paid through the services for the relevant engagement.

termination.title: 12. Termination
termination.content: We may suspend or terminate access to the services at any time if these Terms are violated.

governingLaw.title: 13. Governing Law & Jurisdiction
governingLaw.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts in Saudi Arabia.
